---
title: "Longitudinal Test"
output: html_document
---

# Longitudinal test for CFAR Social Networks

Check-ins are at 6/12/18/24mo periods

### Preliminaries 

```{r echo = T, results = "hide", message = F, warnings = F}
library(tidyr) # data cleaning processing 
library(dplyr) # further data manipulation (%>% (pipe) operator)
library(igraph) # social networks 
library(RColorBrewer) # color palettes 
library(stringr) # regex 
library(purrr) # used to create the network objects 
```


### Data Preparation

We want to be able to stratify by age at enrollment, HEU/HUU, and both together 

- We will then repeat analysis (metrics) at eat time component 
- But first, we will focus on visualization 
- Already have proven that the set.seed() function allows the algorithm to deterministically keep the clusters in the same positions in Igraph plots
- The cleanest way to do this is just to create new datasets at each timepoint and plot from those... to avoid double counting

```{r}
raw_data <- read.csv("/Users/maxschultz/CFAR-SN-Project/Datasets/CHERISHSN_DATA_2026-03-24_1747(in).csv")
# head(raw_data)

unique(raw_data$cfar_tb_v_timepoint) # 1 = 0m, 2 = 6mo, 3 = 12mo, 4 = 18mo, 5 = 24mo, NA 
unique(raw_data$snml_v_timepoint_)
```



```{r}
df_cleaned <- raw_data %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = case_when(
      redcap_event_name == "delivery_arm_3" ~ "0m",
      redcap_event_name == "6_month_arm_3" ~ "6m",
      redcap_event_name == "12_month_arm_3" ~ "12m",
      redcap_event_name == "18_month_k23c2_arm_4" ~ "18m",
      redcap_event_name == "24_month_k23c2_arm_4" ~ "24m",
      redcap_event_name == "12_month_k23c2_arm_4" ~ "12m",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("0m", "6m", "12m", "18m", "24m"))
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches(
      "^(snml_sex|snml_vage|snml_relate|hh_id|pcare|tb_dx|lived|stayed|visited|occas|elswe|room|bed|smoke|drug)_\\d+cf"
    ),
    names_to = c(".value", "ctc_idx"),
    names_pattern = "^(snml_sex|snml_vage|snml_relate|hh_id|pcare|tb_dx|lived|stayed|visited|occas|elswe|room|bed|smoke|drug)_(\\d+)cf(?:___1)?$",
    values_drop_na = FALSE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ctc_idx = as.integer(ctc_idx),
    contact_visit_id = str_c("ctc_", record_id, "_tp_", timepoint, "_idx_", ctc_idx)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(timepoint),
    !(is.na(snml_sex) & is.na(snml_vage) & is.na(snml_relate) & is.na(hh_id))
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    record_id = as.character(record_id),
    contact_visit_id,
    timepoint,
    enrol_age_mrg = as.numeric(enrol_age),
    enrol_age_yrs_mrg = as.integer(floor(enrol_age_mrg / 365.25)),
    cherish_sn_study_group_mrg = factor(cherish_sn_study_group),
    final_igra_results = factor(igra_results_cfar_complete),
    snml_vage_mrg = as.numeric(snml_vage),
    snml_sex_mrg = factor(snml_sex),
    snml_relate_mrg = factor(snml_relate),
    hh_id_unified_ = factor(hh_id),
    pcare_mrg = factor(pcare),
    smoke_mrg = factor(smoke),
    drug_mrg = factor(drug),
    tb_dx_mrg = factor(tb_dx),
    lived_mrg = factor(lived),
    stayed_mrg = factor(stayed),
    visited_mrg = factor(visited),
    occas_mrg = factor(occas),
    elswe_mrg = factor(elswe),
    room_mrg = factor(room),
    bed_mrg = factor(bed)
  )

head(df_cleaned)

```


```{r}
raw_data %>%
  mutate(
    has_contact_cf = !(is.na(snml_sex_1cf) & is.na(snml_vage_1cf) & is.na(snml_relate_1cf) & is.na(hh_id_1cf))
  ) %>%
  count(redcap_event_name, has_contact_cf)



raw_data %>%
  mutate(
    has_contact_noncf = !(is.na(snml_sex_1) & is.na(snml_vage_1) & is.na(snml_relate_1) & is.na(hh_id_1))
  ) %>%
  count(redcap_event_name, has_contact_noncf)
```




```{r}
raw_data %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = case_when(
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 1 ~ "0m",
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 2 ~ "6m",
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 3 ~ "12m",
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 4 ~ "18m",
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 5 ~ "24m",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  count(timepoint)
```





```{r}
step1 <- raw_data %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = case_when(
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 1 ~ "0m",
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 2 ~ "6m",
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 3 ~ "12m",
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 4 ~ "18m",
      cfar_tb_v_timepoint == 5 ~ "24m",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

unique(step1$timepoint)
```



```{r}
step2 <- step1 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^(snml_sex|snml_vage|snml_relate|hh_id|pcare|tb_dx|lived|stayed|visited|occas|elswe|room|bed|smoke|drug)_\\d+cf"),
    names_to = c(".value", "ctc_idx"),
    names_pattern = "^(snml_sex|snml_vage|snml_relate|hh_id|pcare|tb_dx|lived|stayed|visited|occas|elswe|room|bed|smoke|drug)_(\\d+)cf(?:___1)?$",
    values_drop_na = FALSE
  )

unique(step2$timepoint)
table(step2$timepoint, useNA = "ifany")
```



```{r}
raw_data$redcap_event_name
```
q
